tasks.description: Search SEC filings (EDGAR) for US Steel's filings related to the planned merger with Nippon Steel. Identify 8-K, S-4, proxy statements, or other filings that disclose financial terms, strategic rationale, and impact on operations. Extract key numbers: purchase price, premium, expected closing date, etc.

input.query: US Steel Nippon Steel merger SEC filings 8-K proxy statement

success_criteria: At least two relevant SEC filings found
Key financial terms (purchase price, premium) extracted with exact numbers

tasks.description: Search for official press releases and company announcements from US Steel and Nippon Steel regarding the merger. Use web search and company investor relations pages. Extract announcement dates, financial terms, strategic rationale, and any statements about operational impact.

input.query: US Steel Nippon Steel merger press release official announcement

success_criteria: At least two official press releases found

tasks.description: Audit the gathered sources from T1 and T2 for consistency. Check for conflicting numbers, dates, or statements. Verify that all key claims are traceable to primary sources. Resolve any contradictions by identifying the most authoritative source (SEC filing over press release if conflict). Produce a consolidated list of verified facts.

input.query: Consolidate and verify sources from T1 and T2 outputs

success_criteria: Each fact has at least one primary source citation
